text.title: django-models Core Rules
text.summary: Six rules for designing Django domain models.

rule.statement: Every domain model inherits from `BaseModel` (see `django-base-model`). No model defines its own `id` / `uid` / timestamps.
rule.rationale: Consistent surface across the codebase; one place to evolve the contract.

rule.statement: Every `ForeignKey` declares `on_delete=`. Default to `PROTECT`; `CASCADE` only when children are semantically owned; `SET_NULL` for soft refs.
rule.rationale: Implicit `on_delete` removed in Django 2.0; deletion semantics are part of the schema, not implementation detail.

rule.statement: Status / kind / role / state fields use `TextChoices` (or `IntegerChoices`). Plain string literals forbidden.
rule.rationale: TextChoices give typed enums, .choices for forms, translation hooks. Plain strings drift and break refactors.

rule.statement: Multi-column query patterns get `Meta.indexes = [models.Index(fields=[...])]`. FK auto-index covers FK column only.
rule.rationale: Multi-column filters do a full table scan without a covering index. Meta.indexes is the documented way to declare them.

rule.statement: Model methods are limited to: representations (`__str__`), simple property fields (`@property full_name`), and pure-self queries (`is_active`). Cross-model orchestration belongs in services.
rule.rationale: Model methods accumulate hidden side effects and create circular dependencies between models. The service layer is the right home for orchestration.

rule.statement: Custom managers are read-only helpers (`.active()`, `.recent()`). No `.create_with_x()` orchestration.
rule.rationale: Same reason as r5: orchestration belongs in services. Managers should compose querysets.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r1-explicit-trigger' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r2-bounded-output' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.

rule.statement: Stub rule for conclusion 'r3-evidence-anchored' referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml. Replace with the real testable rule that resolves this branch of the tree.
rule.rationale: Auto-added by fix-methodology-phase-d.py to keep tree refs resolvable.
